# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

This project aims to be useful, respectful, and straightforward to collaborate on.

Participants are expected to:

- Be respectful and professional.
- Focus feedback on code, behavior, and decisions.
- Assume good intent, but communicate clearly when something is wrong.
- Avoid harassment, discrimination, personal attacks, and disruptive behavior.

## Scope

This applies to issues, pull requests, discussions, commit messages, and other project spaces.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may edit, remove, or reject contributions and interactions that do not meet this standard.

## Reporting

To report unacceptable behavior, contact `umarawanuk@yahoo.co.uk`.
